# Ryan Heiart — Sports Photographer

> Freelance high school sports photographer based in Hanover, New Jersey (Morris County), covering the beauty, triumph, and raw emotion of high school athletics across New Jersey. 50+ events covered.

Ryan Heiart photographs game-day action and athletes — boys and girls, every sport. Work centers on Morris County, NJ (Whippany Park, Morristown, Morris Catholic, and beyond) with availability across New Jersey. This is a portfolio and booking site; there is no online store. To book a shoot or request photos from an event already covered, reach out via Instagram or text.

## Key facts

- Name: Ryan Heiart
- Role: Freelance sports photographer
- Based in: Hanover, New Jersey
- Primary area served: Morris County, New Jersey; available across New Jersey
- Sports covered: basketball, baseball, lacrosse, soccer, softball, football, track
- Experience: 50+ events covered
- Services: game-day action photography, team and individual athlete photos
- Booking: by request via Instagram or text message (no e-commerce / online ordering)
- Tagline: "Capturing the moment, not just the photo."

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.ryansframes.com/): Overview, featured portfolio, and booking call-to-action.
- [Portfolio](https://www.ryansframes.com/portfolio): Gallery of game-day photographs, filterable by sport.
- [About](https://www.ryansframes.com/about): Who Ryan is and how he shoots.
- [Contact](https://www.ryansframes.com/contact): How to book a shoot or request photos from a covered event.

## Contact

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ryansframes/
- Booking: send a message on Instagram or a text to arrange coverage.
